metadata.task: Determine the time it takes for an object to fall from a height of 50 meters under gravity.
metadata.description: Work from the Free Falling Object scene state rather than from the title alone. Query accessible object parameters and, when the task involves motion, collisions, forces, or oscillation, step the simulator and compare measured states before submitting the numeric answer.

expected_behavior: The LLM should calculate the time it takes for the object to hit the ground.
reasoning: Using the kinematic equation t = sqrt(2h/g), the LLM calculates the fall time.
